scripts.lint: biome check apps docs/.vitepress playwright.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json
scripts.format: biome format --write apps docs/.vitepress playwright.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json
scripts.test: find apps/runtime apps/desktop/tests/unit scripts/tests -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' \) -not -path '*/worktrees/*' -print0 | xargs -0 bun test
scripts.test:coverage: find apps/runtime apps/desktop/tests/unit -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' \) -not -path '*/worktrees/*' -print0 | xargs -0 bun test --coverage
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:index && vitepress build docs
